refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.
DP2: Task management system for dynamic scheduling and assignment.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and reporting system for productivity monitoring.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.

coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses FR1 independently; interfaces with DP2 and DP3 are well-defined and manageable.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for control algorithms.
Risk that adaptive control may not fully capture all operational variabilities.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 and DP3 in subsequent decomposition levels to ensure holistic productivity support.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for equipment operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends operational data and status to Teleoperation and Safety Services modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task assignments and scheduling information from Teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of adaptive control logic within Vehicle; minimal diffusion needed.
Limited containment; mostly receives telemetry and sends tasking.
Minimal containment; primarily monitors safety alerts.
System-level coordination but not direct control implementation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Adaptive control algorithms are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize interface complexity and ensure real-time responsiveness.
containment_risks: Potential tight coupling with Teleoperation for tasking may increase interface complexity.
Embedded system constraints may limit algorithm complexity.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate interface protocols between Vehicle and Teleoperation to reduce coupling and ensure robust tasking communication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR (optimize equipment operation) with clear functional mapping.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists due to tasking interface with Teleoperation, but containment within Vehicle is strong.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor Vehicle for DP implementation, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via operational testing of Vehicle control systems and telemetry data analysis.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of adaptive control DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation to reduce coupling.
Plan for integration of task scheduling and telemetry reporting in subsequent decomposition.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, the FR refinement can be improved by explicitly including task scheduling and monitoring sub-FRs to fully cover productivity support. DP selection should consider all sub-FRs for completeness.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

revise.why: To explicitly include all functional aspects contributing to productivity, enabling comprehensive DP and IM mapping.

assumptions: Accurate sensor data is available for control algorithms.
Tasking and telemetry interfaces are stable and well-defined.
open_risks: Potential complexity in coordinating Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Embedded system constraints may limit algorithm sophistication.
evidence_needed: Operational data demonstrating control algorithm effectiveness.
Interface performance metrics between Vehicle and Teleoperation.
